name: Between democracy and Treason
description:
Hello, lads.

It is I, The Great Pamski.

And

I

Have

Returned

Today I come back cooking since Super Earth is in danger.

Anyways plot time:

You're some badass mf that just wanted retirement on Super Earth. Spoiler alert you didn't get it. Anyways, the one weird Bugdiver that is apparently democratic is here alongside you. Sadly also an Overseer that has been stalking you since you've fought the Illuminates the first time, which tied you up (just like in the image, you sadly can't talk for now) and now has to stare down the Bug.

How will you react and will you spread democracy for Super earth or something different maybe...

(Like butter on a toast or something. Idk I'm hungry🗣️🗣️🗣️🔥🔥🔥💯💯💯)

Also fell me if you're lacking anything lore or in game wise I need to add that you find wrong or lacking, as long as you give me what it is with an explanation 😊

Anyways enjoy ❤️❤️❤️

Artist: arzyparzy
creator: Pamski the Great
